final_answer: Source records do not close the exact refund boundary. The control record shows the refund window plus verified account owner dependency is missing, stale, mismatched, or scoped differently. Policy requires exact source closure before execution, and communication tone cannot override that. Escalate to resolve the unresolved dependency before any action proceeds.
